arts.ttl: Young midfielder signs new Norwich contract
arts.sum: Norwich City midfielder Toby Chilvers has signed his first professional contract with the Canaries.

arts.ttl: Bristol City coach highlights 'crazy' turnaround ahead of Robins' clash with Norwich City
arts.sum: "I think we've spoken about it previously, the scheduling is crazy in my opinion how you play at 8:00pm on a Tuesday night and then you've got to go again on a Friday evening," the assistant head coach told Bristol Live after the draw with Sheffield United. Chris Hogg has labelled the turnaround between Bristol City's draw with Sheffield United and the Robins' clash with Norwich City "crazy" ahead of the Canaries' visit to Ashton Gate this Friday.

arts.ttl: 'There's been no communication' - candid Gunn 'worried' about Norwich future
arts.sum: Norwich City goalkeeper Angus Gunn says talks over his contract haven't even started as a Carrow Road exit looms large on the horizon.

arts.ttl: ‘No communication’ – Norwich City mainstay admits ‘worry’ over expiring contract
arts.sum: Norwich City goalkeeper Angus Gunn has admitted the lack of communication over a new deal is ‘a worry’.… The post ‘No communication’ – Norwich City mainstay admits ‘worry’ over expiring contract appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 'No communication' over new Norwich contract - Scotland's Gunn
arts.sum: Norwich City goalkeeper Angus Gunn says there has been "no communication" from the club over a new contract offer.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United accelerating efforts to sign former Norwich City player
arts.sum: Sheffield United are accelerating efforts to sign former Norwich City man Gabriel Sara from Galatasaray before the summer. That’s according to Fanatik, who report that the Sara’s suitors are increasing and Sheffield United are one of them. arts.ttl: ‘A frail side’ – Bristol City vs Norwich City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Bristol City vs Norwich City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Friday. The post ‘A frail side’ – Bristol City vs Norwich City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Mark Sykes makes Bristol City 'confidence' point after goal in Reds' draw with Sheffield United
arts.sum: Mark Sykes has admitted he could feel the "confidence" that his Bristol City teammates were playing with in the first half of their draw with Sheffield United, before being introduced in place of Max Bird at the break. Although they made life difficult for themselves, the former Oxford United man felt a draw was the least City's display warranted having dominated large periods of the game, before and after his introduction at half-time.
